title: Full case statement with default entry creates $dlatch
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

`yosys -p "prep" case.v`
```
module mux_case_4_1 (input [4-1:0] i, input [2-1:0] s, output reg [0:0] o);
always @*
    case (s)
        0: o <= i[0];
        1: o <= i[1];
        2: o <= i[2];
        3: o <= i[3];
        default: o <= 1'bx;
    endcase
endmodule
```

## Expected behavior

```
   Number of cells:                  5
     $eq                             3
     $logic_not                      1
     $pmux                           1
```

## Actual behavior

```
   Number of cells:                 14
     $and                            3
     $dlatch                         1
     $eq                             3
     $logic_not                      1
     $not                            5
     $pmux                           1
```

This works as expected:
```
module mux_case_4_1 (input [4-1:0] i, input [2-1:0] s, output reg [0:0] o);
always @*
    case (s)
        //0: o <= i[0];
        1: o <= i[1];
        2: o <= i[2];
        3: o <= i[3];
        default: o <= i[0];
    endcase
endmodule
```
